_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to pay attention and share the experience when we listen to or look at stories by Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander creators.

_source.w: We are learning to pay attention and share the experience when we listen to or look at stories by Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander creators.
y: Sharing stories together helps us feel connected to each other and to Country.
Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander stories teach us about the world in special ways.
Paying attention to stories is how we learn to enjoy and understand them.
eg: We sit with others and look at a book by an Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander author.
We watch a digital story together and show we are interested by looking at the screen.
We listen to a Dreaming story and show we are paying attention.
We point to pictures in a book by a First Nations illustrator.
We smile or react when something interesting happens in a shared story.
We sit with a friend and look at the same book together.
